title: T4061 NR4 - Non-Resident Tax Withholding, Remitting, and Reporting - Canada.ca
content:
## T4061 NR4 - Non-Resident Tax Withholding, Remitting, and Reporting
This guide explains how and when to withhold non-resident tax, how to remit it and how to file the NR4 return.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format t4061-e.html PDF t4061-25e.pdf Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2024 – Standard print PDF (t4061-24e.pdf) 2023 – Standard print PDF (t4061-23e.pdf) 2022 – Standard print PDF (t4061-22e.pdf) 2021 – Standard print PDF (t4061-21e.pdf) 2020 – Standard print PDF (t4061-20e.pdf) 2019 – Standard print PDF (t4061-19e.pdf) 2019 – Standard print PDF (t4061-19f.pdf) 2018 – Standard print PDF (t4061-10-18e.pdf) 2018 – Standard print PDF (t4061-18e.pdf) 2017 – Standard print PDF (t4061-17e.pdf) 2016 – Standard print PDF (t4061-16e.pdf) 2015 – Standard print PDF (t4061-15e.pdf) 2014 – Standard print PDF (t4061-14e.pdf) 2013 – Standard print PDF (t4061-13e.pdf) 2012 – Standard print PDF (t4061-12e.pdf) 2011 – Standard print PDF (t4061-11e.pdf) 2010 – Standard print PDF (t4061-10e.pdf) 2009 – Standard print PDF (t4061-09e.pdf) 2008 – Standard print PDF (t4061-08e.pdf) 2007 – Standard print PDF (t4061-07e.pdf) 2006 – Standard print PDF (t4061-06e.pdf) 2005 – Standard print PDF (t4061-05e.pdf) 2004 – Standard print PDF (t4061-04e.pdf) 2003 – Standard print PDF (t4061-03e.pdf) 2002 – Standard print PDF (t4061-02e.pdf) 2001 – Standard print PDF (t4061-01e.pdf)
